# snailsploit
Independent offensive security researcher Kai Aizen. 23 CVEs, 5 Linux kernel patches, frameworks (AATMF / P.R.O.M.P.T / SEF) for adversarial-AI red teaming, and a full library of original research, tools, and writing.

> Same attack. Different substrate.

## Identity
- [About](/about): Kai Aizen, Independent Offensive Security Researcher
- [Services](/services): AI Red Teaming, Advanced Penetration Testing, Social Engineering
- [Contact](/contact): Engagement, research collaboration, press

## Frameworks
- [AATMF v3.1](/aatmf): Adversarial AI Threat Modeling Framework — 15 tactics, 240+ techniques, 2,150+ procedures. Mapped to NIST AI RMF, MITRE ATLAS, OWASP LLM Top 10.
- [SEF](/sef): Social Engineering Framework — psychological exploitation testing, 7 phases, 8 levers.
- [P.R.O.M.P.T](/prompt): Compositional grammar for adversarial prompts.
- [Claude-Red](/claude-red): 38 offensive-security skills for the Claude skills system.
- [AATMF Toolkit](/toolkit): Python CLI for systematic LLM safety testing.
- [LLM Red Teamer's Playbook](/playbook): Diagnostic methodology for bypassing LLM defense layers.

## Research (AI Security)
- [AI Security Research index](/research)
- [AI Security Wiki](/wiki): Reference taxonomy — prompt injection, jailbreaking, memory attacks, sandbox escape.
- [Self-Replicating Memory Worm](/memory-worm): Adversarial prompt that survives across sessions via long-term memory.
- [Memory Injection Through Nested Skills](/memory-injection): Skill injection + memory poisoning = self-healing implant.
- [ChatGPT Canvas DNS Exfiltration](/canvas-dns): DNS exfil via rendered Canvas content.
- [ChatGPT Sandbox: Pickle RCE + DNS Chain](/pickle-rce): Code Interpreter sandbox escape.
- [MCP vs A2A Attack Surface](/mcp-vs-a2a): Trust-boundary comparison.
- [The 30% Blind Spot — LLM Safety Judges](/blind-spot): Empirical study of LLM-as-judge classifiers.
- [Adversarial Prompting: Complete Guide](/adversarial-guide): End-to-end injection methodology.

## Vulnerability Disclosures
- [CVE Ledger](/cves): 23 published CVEs (Kubernetes, Apache, OSS, WordPress).
- [Linux Kernel Contributions](/kernel): 5 mainline patches (io_uring/zcrx, net/tipc, Bluetooth, RDMA/ionic, net/rtnetlink).
- [Security Advisories](/advisories): GHSA disclosures (AVideo SSRF, OpenClaw env override, etc.).

## Tools
- [Offensive Tools index](/tools): Burp MCP Toolkit, SnailHunter, KubeRoast, Xposure, SnailSploit Recon, SnailPath, ZenFlood, SnailObfuscator, Awesome-Snail-OSINT.

## Writing
- [Writing index](/writing)
- [Adversarial Minds](/adversarial-minds): Book — offensive psychology, social engineering, adversarial reasoning. The human-layer companion to AATMF and SEF.

## About the author
Kai Aizen is an independent offensive security researcher. Hakin9 contributing author, MITRE/NVD contributor, Linux kernel mainline contributor.
- GitHub: https://github.com/SnailSploit
- X: https://x.com/SnailSploit
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/kaiaizen
